author: Toei Animation
text:
Robin & Saul Will Finally Reunite in Elbaph | ONE PIECE
The emotional reunion is almost here. The bond between Robin and Saul, stretching back to Ohara, will reach a new chapter. Witness their reunion in the upcoming episode 1163 of ONE PIECE and the start of a grand adventure. 

#ONEPIECE #ELBAPH
